sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 블룸에너지, 2026년 1분기 매출 130% 급증 및 연간 매출 성장 가이던스 상향 조정

keyPoints.text: 2026년 1분기 매출은 전년 동기 대비 130.4% 증가한 7억 5,110만 달러를 기록하며 기록적인 성장을 달성했습니다.
강력한 실적을 바탕으로 2026년 연간 매출 성장률 가이던스 중간값을 기존 60%에서 80% 수준으로 상향 조정했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 제품 매출이 전년 동기 대비 208% 성장하며 전체 매출 증가를 견인했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 1분기 영업이익은 7,220만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 9,130만 달러 증가하며 흑자 전환했습니다.

watchItems.text: 상향 조정된 연간 매출 성장 가이던스 80%를 달성하기 위한 제품 수요 유지 여부와 서비스 부문의 수익성 개선 지속성을 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 ex991_q126financialresults.htm EX-99.1 Document PRESS RELEASE Bloom Energy Reports Record First Quarter 2026 Results and Raises Full Year 2026 Guidance • Delivered 130% year-over-year revenue growth, driven by 208% product revenue growth • Raised full year 2026 revenue growth guidance midpoint to ~80% year-over-year, up from prior guidance of ~60% • Continued operating leverage, increasing gross margin and operating income guidance SAN JOSE, Calif., April 28, 2026—Bloom Energy Corporation (NYSE: BE) (“Bloom,” “Bloom Energy,” “We,” or the “Company”) reported today its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026. First Quarter Highlights • Revenue of $751.1 million in the first quarter of 2026, an increase of 130.4% compared to $326.0 million in the first quarter of 2025. Product revenue   Normalized numeric aliases: $751.1 million = 7억 5,110만 달러; $326.0 million = 3억 2,600만 달러; $653.3 million = 6억 5,330만 달러; $751.1 = 751.1달러; $326.0 = 326.0달러; $653.3 = 653.3달러.

ed to $211.9 million in the first quarter of 2025. • Gross margin of 30.0% in the first quarter of 2026, an increase of 2.8 percentage points year-over-year. Non-GAAP gross margin of 31.5% in the first quarter of 2026, an increase of 2.8 percentage points year-over-year. • Service gross margin of 13.3% in the first quarter of 2026, an increase of 12.0 percentage points compared to 1.3% in the first quarter of 2025. Service non-GAAP gross margin of 18.0% in the first quarter of 2026, an increase of 13.2 percentage points compared to 4.8% in the first quarter of 2025. • Operating income of $72.2 million in the first quarter of 2026, an increase of $91.3 million year-over-year.
